creator: tevans.uk@googlemail.com
text:
I'm afraid I was mislead by the projects homepage, which listed 0.9a as
the current stable version. I have now found that the 'a' means alpha,
and it is VERY alpha currently! I don't think it is worth updating the
port currently, as it would break anyone using the 0.1 version.

I may resubmit as a new devel/py-fabric-devel port this weekend, or just
wait for it to stabilize a bit!

Cheers

Tom
